requiredHumanDecisions.question: Should the NAIC item keep its current page and section reference format?
requiredHumanDecisions.whyItMatters: Exact citation format must be stable before any learner-facing promotion.

requiredHumanDecisions.question: Should the pricing fixture stay review-only until real pricing sources are added?

exceptionsAndFlags.message: Placeholder citation should be replaced with source-verified locator before promotion.
Pricing example is intentionally synthetic and should remain review-only.

citationIssues.details: Placeholder page and section reference need source verification.
citationIssues.recommendedAction: Replace with exact source locator before any promotion.

citationIssues.details: Synthetic pricing fixture does not have a real source reference.
citationIssues.recommendedAction: Keep review-only; do not export as approved content.

promotionRecommendation.recommendedNextStep: Confirm citation handling and then move on to a real pilot batch.

ragReadiness.reason: No approved indexed material exists in the demo fixture.
